name: Sugar Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl combine butter and shortening.
2. In a large bowl combine remaining cookie ingredients: 6 cups all-purpose flour, 1 tablespoon baking powder, and 1 tablespoon salt.
3. Using a pastry blender, two knives, or a food processor, cut the shortening mixture into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse meal.
4. Store in an air-tight container in the refrigerator until ready to use.
5. To make sugar cookies: In a large bowl, combine 2 cups of the cookie mix with 2/3 cup sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, 2 tablespoons milk, and 1 egg. Mix until well combined.
6. Roll the dough on a floured surface using a floured rolling pin to about 1/8 inch thickness.
7. Cut shapes and bake at 400°F (200°C) on a lightly greased cookie sheet for 5-8 minutes, or until lightly browned on the edges.
8. Sprinkle with colored sugar before baking if desired, or frost and decorate when cooled.
To make colored sugars:
1. In a jar, combine 1/4 cup sugar with 2 drops of food coloring. Cover tightly and shake until blended.
